# Fábio Dias — Software Engineer

> Backend Developer specialized in Go, Kotlin, and distributed systems.
> 10+ years building scalable microservices and leading engineering teams.
> Based in Lisbon, Portugal.

## Sections
- [Professional Experience](https://sithengineer.github.io/#experience): 8+ roles from Android to Go backend and team lead
- [Education](https://sithengineer.github.io/#education): Postgraduate and Bachelor's in Computer Science Engineering
